title: Package docs browser, API routes, and Fluent UI polish

source.subject: feat(docs): package docs browser, API, and Fluent UI polish

body:
## Outcome

Package docs browser, API, and Fluent UI polish.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance
